title: Holes
why_this_song: Holes by Passenger (2013) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 24 times; first heard in: "Now we've got holes in our hearts, yeah we've got holes in our lives"
Appears 24 times; first heard in: "Now we've got holes in our hearts, yeah we've got holes in our lives"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "He lay asleep for six hole weeks, they were gonna ask his mother to choose"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Oh but now that he's gone well life carries on and I miss him like a hole in the head"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Now we've got holes in our hearts, yeah we've got holes in our lives"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:
exercises.excerpt_after: got nothing, you've got nothing to lose

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:
exercises.excerpt_after: you can't change and you can't choose
got nothing, you've got nothing to lose
you can't change and you can't choose

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "we've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "we've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "holes" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "holes" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Holes", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Holes", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Holes" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Holes" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Holes" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Holes", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
